pattern_en: One of the first things I noticed was ~
pattern_ko: 제가 가장 먼저 눈에 띈 것 중 하나는 ~였어요.

example.en: One of the first things I noticed was the cozy atmosphere.
example.ko: 제가 가장 먼저 눈에 띈 것 중 하나는 아늑한 분위기였어요.

pattern_en: It is surrounded by ~

example.en: It is surrounded by tall buildings and trees.
example.ko: 그곳은 높은 건물과 나무들로 둘러싸여 있어요.

pattern_en: The interior is decorated with ~

example.en: The interior is decorated with wooden furniture.
example.ko: 내부는 나무 가구로 꾸며져 있어요.

pattern_en: What I like most about this place is ~

example.en: What I like most about this place is the peaceful atmosphere.
example.ko: 제가 이곳에서 가장 좋아하는 점은 평화로운 분위기예요.

pattern_en: The place is divided into ~

example.en: The place is divided into several sections.
example.ko: 그곳은 여러 구역으로 나누어져 있어요.

pattern_en: It is much bigger than I expected.

example.en: The park is much bigger than I expected.
example.ko: 그 공원은 생각보다 훨씬 더 커요.

pattern_en: One of its unique features is ~

example.en: One of its unique features is the rooftop garden.
example.ko: 그곳의 독특한 특징 중 하나는 옥상 정원이에요.

pattern_en: It looks clean and well-maintained.

example.en: The building looks clean and well-maintained.
example.ko: 그 건물은 깔끔하고 관리가 잘 되어 보여요.

pattern_en: The lighting makes the place feel ~

example.en: The lighting makes the place feel warm and cozy.
example.ko: 조명 때문에 그곳이 따뜻하고 아늑하게 느껴져요.

pattern_en: Overall, I would describe it as ~

example.en: Overall, I would describe it as calm and relaxing.
example.ko: 전반적으로 저는 그곳을 차분하고 편안하다고 표현하고 싶어요.

pattern_en: The first impression I got was ~

example.en: The first impression I got was that it looked modern.
example.ko: 제가 처음 받은 인상은 현대적으로 보인다는 것이었어요.

pattern_en: The atmosphere feels ~

example.en: The atmosphere feels lively and energetic.
example.ko: 분위기가 활기차고 에너지 넘치게 느껴져요.

pattern_en: What stands out the most is ~

example.en: What stands out the most is the colorful decoration.
example.ko: 가장 눈에 띄는 것은 화려한 장식이에요.

pattern_en: There is plenty of space for ~

example.en: There is plenty of space for people to relax.
example.ko: 사람들이 쉬기에 충분한 공간이 있어요.

pattern_en: The area around it is filled with ~

example.en: The area around it is filled with restaurants and cafes.
example.ko: 그 주변은 식당과 카페들로 가득 차 있어요.

pattern_en: You can often hear ~

example.en: You can often hear soft music in the background.
example.ko: 배경에서 잔잔한 음악 소리를 자주 들을 수 있어요.

pattern_en: It tends to get crowded during ~

example.en: It tends to get crowded during weekends.
example.ko: 주말에는 사람이 많아지는 편이에요.

pattern_en: The weather makes the place feel ~

example.en: The weather makes the place feel refreshing.
example.ko: 날씨 때문에 그곳이 상쾌하게 느껴져요.

pattern_en: I feel comfortable because ~

example.en: I feel comfortable because the place is quiet.
example.ko: 그곳이 조용해서 편안함을 느껴요.

pattern_en: The view from there is ~

example.en: The view from there is absolutely beautiful.
example.ko: 거기서 보는 풍경은 정말 아름다워요.
